heading: Omitted
label: 741 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which set out the purpose of this subchapter, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1207, § 168 Stat. 1099

Repeal of Inconsistent Laws, , which provided for repeal of Acts or parts of Acts inconsistent with this subchapter, insofar as they affected the tribe or its members, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Act Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1207, § 2068 Stat. 1104
Separability, , which set forth separability provision, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Act Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1207, § 2168 Stat. 1104
